Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}No worries, dude. I got your back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just leave everything to me and my mad sword skills![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2082 0 0}You got it! Just sit back, relax, and enjoy the show, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess you're probably right... Maybe. Just kinda. Partially.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2070 0 0}Hey, ya know that thing we use to summon our Personas... the Evoker?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I was thinking, why's it gotta look like a gun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, you gotta be a little nutty to point a gun at your head and pull the trigger, ya know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}I was told that our Personas reflect who we are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think that's why my Persona is super hot-blooded.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Like, "Yo, catch these hands!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Guess there's no hiding a strong sense of justice, and you know me—I'm a hero in the making![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2105 0 0}Bro, don't weapons and armor cost way too much?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I gueeess quality matters... It does kinda make me feel stronger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know we can't be stingy when it comes to equipment, but man... My wallet is crying in pain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Did you hear? The used bookstore at the Iwatodai strip mall just reopened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Usually, you can find the rarest of rare manga buried somewhere at those kinda shops![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hmmm... Maybe I should go check it out. I'm actually pretty good at digging up treasure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}...Go for it, but try not to clown around there too much, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Apparently, my Persona's supposed to be real strong against fire![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Call the fire department 'cause I'm burnin' with passion, baby![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, you can leave the strong enemies to me. I can take the heat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, as exciting as THAT sounds... I think I'll pass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2078 0 0}I hear lots of gamers love Innocent Sin Online.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, since tomorrow's a holiday...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You should play it, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}And we have school tomorrow... I guess that means Tartarus is a no-go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}Alrighty then, time to hit the hay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2032 0 0}Uh, you serious? I wouldn't if I were you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Besides, it'd be just you and me there. You know, like, Brokeback Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, let's be good kids and stay in tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Well, let's just chill for tonight since we can't go to Tartarus anyways.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}By the way, when we were fightin' in Tartarus, I was thinkin'...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even Shadows have stuff they're not good at... Like, they have weaknesses, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Like how I'm not good at studying, y'know? For a sec, I thought they were kinda relatable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Sanada-san's gotta be, like... a superhuman or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Didn't a Shadow injure him? But he's acting totally normal, like it was no big deal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Normally, people wouldn't be all like, "I gotta heal up fast so I can jump back into the fight."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}He really is a boxing champ. Worlds apart from us ordinary folks, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2103 0 0}At this rate, I'm gonna spend Golden Week the same way I always have![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Lazing around, hanging out with dudes— Er, not that I don't love your company, my dude, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's just sad... Too sad! Even though I'm a changed man this year![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2002 0 0}'Sup? You got no plans today either?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can't believe that I don't have anything to do during Golden Week.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Well, go ahead then. The door's right there. Don't worry 'bout me. I'll just be here, doing nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, do you actually think about the enemy's next move and stuff during battle?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_25_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2025 0 0}Yeah, I prolly shoulda guessed, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Wait, hold up... So you're just guessing? Uh, is it really okay for a leader to do that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}It's important to analyze the situation and quickly think of a strategy during battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Watching the enemy's every move and thinking two steps ahead of them would be ideal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That way, our victory would be assured. We're counting on you, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Thinking and fighting at the same time is easier said than done. You think so, too, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}Thinking two steps ahead of the enemy... That'd totally fry my brain, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}Sanada-san and Kirijo-senpai aren't back yet. Guess we won't be going to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yuka-tan said she's gonna go study in her room. Hmmm... What to do, what to do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Man, I wish there was an easier way to get to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I ain't even talkin' about the climbin'. 'Cause first, we gotta go all the way to school, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}But what if I just opened my door and it leads me straight to Tartarus!? Now that would be nifty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1124 0 0}Stop spewing nonsense already...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Why on earth would anyone want their door to be connected to Tartarus?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Kirijo-senpai is gorgeous, but, man, she's real scary, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}But it's true the number of cases 'round here has been going up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It doesn't feel right to just sit tight and do nothing at a time like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}Hey, don'tcha think there's been way too many Apathy Syndrome cases lately?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wouldn't it be real bad if we don't do anything about it...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess all we can do right now is focus on beating up the Shadows in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2044 0 0}Oh man... I seriously thought we were all goners yesterday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you saved our ass when you pulled that brake! I'm so glad you were there, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's so good to be alive...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}You know how Shadows come up and attack whenever they see us?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But once they see that we're waaay stronger than them, they'll try running away?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Every time we catch up to 'em, they look like they got the bejeezus scared outta 'em at the start of the battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2114 0 0}I kinda feel bad for 'em, but... oh well, lucky us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Why the heck would anyone think I could fix the command room equipment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Computers ain't my field, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}All I know how to fix is a TV. You just smack the top and voilà![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Yuka-tan went to borrow notes, huh? She must be serious about studying for the exams...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I guess I should get crackin' too... Ugh, what a pain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah, I'll just worry about it tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2096 0 0}Nobody's gonna die if they skip a day of studying! Am I right or am I right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, times like this call for a change of pace! How do you feel about hittin' up Tartarus?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2075 0 0}Studying is actually all about stamina, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I need to get fit and improve my stamina, which means working out and getting a good night's sleep...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hm... Well, guess I don't got time for studying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2105 0 0}How's the studying goin'? Smooth sailing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}Man, you're one serious student, aren'tcha? Unlike me. I haven't even started![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2072 0 0}Reeeally now? Well, I ain't buyin' it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's a proven fact that people who say they don't study actually secretly study their asses off![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}I-I was studying... and I just came out here for a quick break.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, so maybe that's not true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I started out fine, but then I got lazy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}I don't know how everyone can study so much...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}What a bummer, am I right? There could've been another girl on the team...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2026 0 0}Right!? I knew I wasn't the only one who felt that way![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2048 0 0}Seriously? Well, I guess you are a bit of the "I work alone" kinda guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2093 0 0}Yeah, my grades were... Well, they were what I expected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Aw, just leave me alone, man...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2006 0 0}Dude, my Persona just keeps getting stronger and stronger![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I feel like I can take on any enemy now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2072 0 0}Okay, well, maybe not "any" enemy, but I do feel like I've gotten a lot better than before![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Now, if only my grades would go up, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Huh, I guess you do have some self-awareness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}H-Hey, don't make this serious! It was just one of those self-deprecating jokes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Ugh... Now I'm depressed for real.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}We are saving the city, right, Sanada-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Well, yeah... Why state the obvious?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Well, 'cause... it doesn't really feel like it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It'd just be nice if we could get some kinda thank-you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}From the ladies, at least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2105 0 0}Yuka-tan's freakin' out, for no reason![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}All I said to her was that someone might be in her room... or under her bed... or in her closet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, come on, that's nothing to get all worked up about, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Hm... Maybe Yuka-tan's more of a scaredy-cat than I thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}All she'll probably see is one of those big-ass cockroaches. ...Well, I guess that would be pretty scary too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Yuka-tan is way too scared of nothing, don'tcha think? It's not like any of that is real.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2123 0 0}Damn, rumors spread fast, especially this one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Everyone at school knows about it... And soon everyone in town will, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}I thought those stories were all fake...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}But she seems to be doing actual research on them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Is this the power of Junpei's Believe It, or Don't?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}Yikes... She's seriously pissed, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}Dude, there are rumors all over school. Don't people have anything better to talk about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now how are we supposed to figure out what's true or not? It's hopeless![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2077 0 0}I heard people gather there a couple times a month...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}The baddest of the bad all get together... It looks like a reunion for a bunch of ex-convicts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}And apparently they're gonna be there tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2113 0 0}Isn't that really bad? What if we run into them!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}I told you it wasn't a good idea to go there, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}If Aragaki-san hadn't helped us, who knows what would've happened to us...? Ugh, I'm getting an ulcer just thinkin' about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}I said I was sorry! I didn't think it would be that bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Well, now you know! Next time, have a little more faith in what I say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, there's no way in hell I'm ever settin' foot in that place again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Kirijo-senpai and Sanada-san are both at the hospital checking up on Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}That means no Tartarus tonight. Guess we gotta find something random to do to kill some time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}Finally! A new addition to this dorm![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh man, I'm so stoked! Hm, maybe I should clean my room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Dude, she's the exact opposite of Yuka-tan... Smart, kind, modest...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, {f 4 2}, whaddaya think of her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Finally, a nice change of pace![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2050 0 0}Seriously? Man, nothing moves you, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Keep up the attitude, and you'll be wastin' your youth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}I can't wait! A new, exciting addition to our lives, soothing our souls![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Man, I'm so glad I live here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}The girls said no guys allowed... But what if they need more help carrying the heavier stuff?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I guess they'll call for us if they really need the help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}I heard Fuuka's teacher, Mr. Ekoda, got in a lot of trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It must've been because of Kirijo-senpai...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Scary, huh? Beware the power of Kirijo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2077 0 0}Dude, I almost got in trouble with the police today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was damn lucky it was just a false alarm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}Fuuka will be supporting us... *sigh* She has the voice of an angel.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Don't get me wrong, Kirijo-senpai has a nice voice too. It's just that Fuuka's is just so calm and soothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}Hey, do you think Apathy Syndrome can be cured?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2068 0 0}Yeah, maybe if we defeat a Shadow, the spirits it ate will return to their owners.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But then again, they might just get digested.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Huh... Guess that makes Apathy Syndrome an incurable disease.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Whoa, dude... I'm starting to feel the pressure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}All we have to do is defeat the remaining eight, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Then let's do it, man! That way, everything will go back to normal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Koromaru is really one of a kind, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}He really is, and such an obedient boy, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}He always seems to be at the shrine... I wonder if he's eating okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2109 0 0}Why don't we just keep him here? I feel like Kirijo-senpai would say yes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, doesn't she seem like the type to have a Doberman at home?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}And she'd feed it the highest quality filet mignon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5065 0 0}Junpei-kun... I think you read too much manga.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}But that doesn't mean I'm treating this like a game, y'know? I just really want to take 'em down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Shadows come in all shapes and sizes, huh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, they're all creepy as hell... I wonder how they ended up looking the way they do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Ahem. Junpei the Wise has come to a startling conclusion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}...There is no top to Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1142 0 0}Whoa, he's finally snapped... I guess his brain has reached its expiration date.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Actually, that's an interesting idea... It's almost philosophical.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}But, wouldn't that create a big problem for us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, then... Tartarus DOES have a top, after all! Let's leave it as that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's like she's glaring daggers every time she looks at Kirijo-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_097_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe Senpai ate Yuka-tan's last bonbon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2050 0 0}Yeah, maybe you're right. At least, I sure hope so.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}Hey, {f 4 2}, have you heard? Shadows are attacking couples now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I bet the Shadow behind it is one jealous and lonely son of a gun. How sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's not much to do once we're done prepping, and the wait is pretty boring...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Man, there's seriously nothing to do... Maybe I'll swing by the shrine tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2069 0 0}The Shadows just keep gettin' stronger, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even if we train harder, it's always gonna end up a close match, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Reality is harsh, man...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}What if we hit our limit one day and get our asses kicked? That'd be totally lame...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, just leave everything to me! I'll take out the enemy in the blink of an eye![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh man, I'm so pumped... I sure hope I can get some sleep tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2003 0 0}...What. Were you going to order me around, O High and Mighty Leader?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Tch, whatever... I can be just as good as you, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2011 0 0}Well, aren't you calm. Must be 'cause you're a fantastic leader who can do anything, huh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}No matter what happens, you can handle it all by yourself... Isn't that right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Ha... I wish a nobody like me could be like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The only thing anyone knows about Tartarus is that it creates Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Other than that, we're all in the dark...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2114 0 0}I'm so stoked for Yakushima, but that's one thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're as calm as ever, huh. I wish I had your chill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}We should just take this time to forget about all the bad things that have been happening, and have some fun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2029 0 0}Yeah! We're gonna have an awesome time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}Tsk, tsk, tsk... I'm very disappointed in you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Do I have to force you to have fun? I'll make you have fun whether you like it or not![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Dude, I'm so ready for this! Look out, ladies, here I come![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5027 0 0}*sigh* Is that all you think about, Junpei-kun...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}You sure know how to leave your troubles behind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}I wish I could let things go as easily as you do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2032 0 0}You gotta live life to the fullest! And how're you gonna do that if you're always stuck moping?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I know you're right, but still...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_116_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}She's super cute, but made out of steel...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's new territory for me... Honestly, I don't know how to approach this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Exam scores!? Dude, I don't care about that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Defeating Shadows is more important than getting good grades![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Any time spent studying could be used to go to Tartarus and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4075 0 0}Don't get carried away, Iori. You should still study.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}You can learn from defeat... That's something that goes for our battles against Shadows as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_119_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}Amada, huh... And he's still in elementary school? Man, that's young.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I dunno what it is about that kid, but my Junpei senses are going crazy around him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Either he's a little punk, or he's WAY more mature than I am...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I dunno, man... Is it just me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_120_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}If that happens, how will I shop at the convenience store?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_121_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}I guess the concept is too big for your brain to comprehend...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}You're an idiot, ya know that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}I wonder if the next Shadow will be even stronger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe they'll be drained and weak 'cause of the summer heat...? Nah, not happenin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2094 0 0}A city in chaos, huh... Sounds like something out of a movie...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}But what's real scary is that it can totally happen... And we're the only ones who can do anything about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_124_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Amada really respects Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I totally understand how he feels. Dude, Sanada-san won sixteen boxing matches straight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I look up to the guy, then kids must think he's an actual hero, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_126_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2114 0 0}Hey... You think we got what it takes to be heroes? Seems impossible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Oh, you just don't get it. It's all about passion![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_128_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2078 0 0}Dude, isn't our group getting kinda wacky?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}We got a Persona-using robot, and now there's a Persona-using dog![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}What's next, man? A gorilla with the potential?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_129_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}I totally get that feel when you're all fired up 'cause there's someone better than you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But take it easy from time to time, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_130_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2010 0 0}Winning tournaments is cool and all, yeah, but now it's time for the real battle![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}And for us, losin' ain't an option. Get ready for some action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}It's about time for the next full moon. Let's kick some ass again![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Heh, I'll send all our enemies flying outta the park! Look forward to seeing some ultra cool moves![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2112 0 0}It's honestly hot as hell... But at least I'm one cool dude![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, you know you can always count on me, right? Our enemies got nothing on me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}Dude, our missions are always so exhausting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But last night was even worse 'cause we ran into those Strega guys.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}And they look like a pretty annoying bunch. Man... I wish they'd just piss off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}Dude, our missions are always so exhausting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But last night was even worse 'cause we ran into those Strega guys.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}And they look like a pretty annoying bunch. Man... I wish they'd just piss off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Our long awaited summer vacation has been ruined by stupid summer school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_137_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2093 0 0}Sometimes I wish I had Apathy Syndrome... Then, I wouldn't have to think about school anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2032 0 0}Man, how can you stay so focused?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I wish I could be like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_139_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2100 0 0}Are you freakin' kidding me!? Dude, you're such a nerd.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}That's it! Junpei the Wise has yet another brilliant idea![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}All I have to do is become a dog! Then, I won't have to go to summer school either![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_142_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5104 0 0}Hm? Koro-chan is trying to say something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_143_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I bet he's complimenting me for being so smart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1142 0 0}I bet he's laughing at you, saying how stupid you are... Stupei![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_145_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2078 0 0}There's gonna be a summer festival at the shrine tomorrow. You goin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_147_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm in a bit of a financial crisis. Plus, I don't have anyone to go with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Welp, the choice is yours. You should go if you're curious about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_149_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2063 0 0}Yeah, I probably won't go either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_150_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2081 0 0}No money, no girlfriend... I guess I'm not going to the festival.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Man, it's freakin' hot out. My room feels like a sauna.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2096 0 0}Going into battle at his age... Amada's da MAN![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}If he sticks with me, I'll show him how it's done! He can call me Junpei-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Stop acting like a little kid... Amada-kun's more mature than you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_153_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Yuka-tan said that the food she made didn't turn out the way she expected...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}But even Koromaru ran away from it! How bad does your cooking have to be for that to happen?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_154_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2052 0 0}Damn, it's hot... Why's it so hot inside, too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_345_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}I can't believe that Strega guy went to the shrine, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}And why was he half-naked!? Is it 'cause it's summer?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}It's sooo hooot... I wanna eat something that's ice-cold.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Someone... bring me ice cream... please...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_157_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2025 0 0}There are all kinds of people out there, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know those gothic lolitas, right? They still dress themselves up from head to toe in frills even in this heat...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw one drawing all this weird art in a notebook.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2032 0 0}Felt like she was living in a different world, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_158_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Homework is insignificant, compared to Tartarus! We must unlock our hidden potential to defeat the evil Shadows![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Yes! We have an important mission![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}I think homework is also an important mission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_160_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Yeah, and I'm sure Senpai would agree.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_162_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I don't feel sleepy, and I've already cleared all of my games...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_163_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think he's got heat exhaustion. Poor kid...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kids his age should be outside, playin'. You know, have some fun, build up some stamina.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_164_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}Hey, is there anything you can think of that I'm super into?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_167_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2060 0 0}Yeah, you're right... I have to figure it out on my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2035 0 0}Hey, you didn't even think about it... But you're probably right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2093 0 0}Well, I guess there's no point asking other people. Something I'm passionate about... Hmmm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_169_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}All things considered, she's a bit of a weirdo...[n]{f 1 1}
